title: Hacienda El Salitre
description: Circa-1600s hacienda-turned-hotel offering a genteel restaurant with a bar, plus a garden.
address: Rafael Osuna SN, Raquet Club, 76127 Santiago de Querétaro, Qro., Mexico
hotelDescription:
Set in a 17th-century hacienda, this old-world hotel is 16 km from Plaza de Armas in the historic center of Santiago de Querétaro, and 37 km from Querétaro Intercontinental Airport.
 Featuring terracotta tile floors, the unfussy rooms come with flat-screen TVs, air-conditioning and en suite bathrooms, as well as tea and coffeemakers; some have 4-poster beds. A suite has a rustic stone fireplace. Room service is available.
 A genteel restaurant has a bar and a terrace. Other amenities include a garden, a playground and event space.
